title: Senior AI Engineer
company_focus:
Workforce management platform for global payroll, benefits,
taxes, and compliance
description:
About Horizons

At Horizons, we're building the infrastructure to power
borderless teams. By handling global payroll, benefits,
taxes, and compliance, our technology enables businesses to
hire anyone anywhere compliantly at the push of a button.

If you're interested in adding to our vision of enabling
people to work in dream jobs, for every company, and from
anywhere in the world, apply now!

We're committed to building a global, diverse team
representing different and varied backgrounds, perspectives,
and experiences. We welcome applications from everyone,
regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation,
religion, civil or family status, age, or disability. Being
a Horizoneer means being part of a growing, international
family.

Overview:

We're seeking a forward-thinking Senior AI Engineer who
thrives on innovation and wants to play a pivotal role in
transforming the company through cutting-edge AI
technologies. You will lead the charge in integrating AI
across the organization, ensuring its responsible and
impactful adoption.

Responsibilities:

- Implement the company’s AI strategy, setting the foundation
  for AI initiatives across the organization.
- Lead the design, development, and rollout of Large Language
  Models (LLMs) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
  based solutions.
- Participate into design and management of data pipelines for
  efficient data collection, preprocessing, and model
  training.
- Develop and deploy AI models and solutions into the
  company’s cloud infrastructure, ensuring scalability,
  security, and performance.
- Ensure the integrity, quality, and availability of data for
  training and inference.
- Work closely with cross-functional teams to integrate AI
  capabilities into products and services.
- Identify and prioritize areas where AI and machine learning
  models can add value to business processes, products, and
  operations.
- Educate and guide stakeholders on the potential applications
  of AI, fostering a culture of innovation.

Requirements:

- Minimum of 5 years in a Software Development role including
  2 years in AI/ML engineering or a related field, with a
  track record of delivering AI solutions.
- Proven experience with deploying LLMs and RAG solutions in
  production environments.
- Background in building and managing data pipelines for AI/ML
  systems.
- Strong programming skills in Python, with experience in
  frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar.
- Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google
  Cloud) and integrating AI solutions into cloud-based
  systems.
- Proficiency in database management, data wrangling, and
  distributed systems.
- Solid foundation in algorithm design, statistics, and data
  science.
- Previous experience promoting and advocating for technology
  adoption in a corporate setting.

Preferred Skills:

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and tools for managing
  AI/ML workflows.
- Strong communication skills, with the ability to educate and
  influence stakeholders at all levels of the organization.
- Problem-solving mindset with a focus on delivering practical
  and scalable AI solutions.
- Passionate about driving innovation and fostering an AI-
  first culture within the organization.
- High ownership mindset, always striving for improvements.
- Excellent presentation and documentation skills.
- Set high standards for others and for yourself.

If you're passionate about building high quality software
and enjoy working in a supportive team environment, we
encourage you to apply and become a valuable part of our
Product and Engineering team.

What it's like working at Horizons

Our service & product. We're a technology company, not an
accountancy, payroll provider, recruitment firm or similar.
We build a workforce management platform that allows our
customers to hire the best talent in minutes, without
worrying about compliance, payroll, or HR admin.

Our amazing team and environment. Working at Horizons means
you're working on something very exciting: Allowing every
person on the planet to have access to equal opportunities
in living a fulfilled work and personal life. We believe in
hiring from within and going the extra mile to retain top
talent. As the company continues to grow extremely fast, you
will be given the opportunity to develop and grow alongside.

Our benefits and perks. Being a Horizoneer means that you
get the benefit of:

- A competitive salary
- An asynchronous working environment
- A "Remote-First" company environment (or Hybrid) - based on
  the nature of the job
- The ability to work from abroad for a short period of time
- Growth opportunities within the company
- We provide all new joiners with the necessary hardware to
  ensure you have the tools you need to succeed from day one

How to apply

Please fill out the form and upload your CV in a PDF format.

If you don’t have an up-to-date CV but you are still keen to
reaching out, please feel free to add a copy of your
LinkedIn profile instead.

Need help? Get in touch with us at: hiring@joinhorizons.com

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on work building and deploying LLMs
and RAG solutions, including model training, data pipeline
design, and cloud infrastructure deployment. This is direct
work on AI systems rather than supporting infrastructure or
general software engineering.
